The '''Z-'ceptor''' was a type of "[[Ugly/Legends|Ugly]]" [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] that was cobbled together from the salvaged parts of [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] and [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptors]].

==Description==
This type of "[[Ugly/Legends|ugly]]" starfighter used the frontal fuselage of the [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Headhunter]], which was then attached to the "eyeball" fuselage of a [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptor]], the engines of the Headhunter, and the solar collector panels of the Interceptor. Weapon-wise, the craft possessed the two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] from the TIE's wings, while the Z-95's own cannons were attached to either side of the main fuselage. The fighter also bore a twin barreled cannon, resembling a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter's]] [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] turret, mounted on top of the "eyeball" [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]]. Interestingly, a port for an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] was situated at the nose of the fighter rather than behind the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]].

==Usage==
Z-interceptors were [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] used by [[Kavil's Corsairs]] and the [[Kintan Gunrunners]]. They were also involved in the wholesale slaughter of the [[Rendili/Legends|Rendili]] mine-colonies populated by [[Yuzzum/Legends|Yuzzum]] who were fleeing [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] persecution for their religious beliefs.
